metadata.title: DevOps Platform - Sources
metadata.description: Primary sources for Kubernetes operations, IaC, GitOps, CI/CD, observability, incident response, and platform governance

kubernetes.name: Kubernetes Documentation
kubernetes.description: Canonical Kubernetes docs (workloads, networking, storage, security, ops)

kubernetes.name: Kubernetes Releases
kubernetes.description: Release history and supported version policy entry point

kubernetes.name: Kubernetes API Reference
kubernetes.description: Generated API reference (choose a specific version when needed)

kubernetes.name: Helm Documentation
kubernetes.description: Helm charts, templating, and best practices

iac.name: Terraform Documentation
iac.description: Terraform core concepts, workflows, and language reference

iac.name: OpenTofu Documentation
iac.description: Open-source Terraform fork (language + workflows, ecosystem compatibility)

iac.name: Pulumi Documentation
iac.description: Programming-first IaC with TypeScript, Python, Go, C#

containers_and_artifacts.name: Docker Engine Release Notes
containers_and_artifacts.description: Docker Engine release notes (breaking changes and security fixes)

gitops_and_delivery.name: Argo CD Documentation
gitops_and_delivery.description: Argo CD GitOps docs (apps, sync, RBAC, multi-env patterns)

observability.name: Cilium Documentation
observability.description: eBPF-based networking, security, and observability for Kubernetes

observability.name: Tetragon Documentation
observability.description: eBPF-based security observability and runtime enforcement

sre_and_incidents.name: Google SRE Books
sre_and_incidents.description: SRE fundamentals, SLOs, alerting, incident response, and postmortems

security_and_supply_chain.name: SLSA v1.0 Specification
security_and_supply_chain.description: Supply-chain Levels for Software Artifacts (provenance and build integrity)

security_and_supply_chain.name: Sigstore
security_and_supply_chain.description: Artifact signing and verification (cosign, transparency log)

security_and_supply_chain.name: cosign (artifact signing)
security_and_supply_chain.description: Sign and verify container images and other artifacts

security_and_supply_chain.name: Syft (SBOM generation)
security_and_supply_chain.description: Generate SBOMs for images and filesystems

security_and_supply_chain.name: Grype (vulnerability scanning)
security_and_supply_chain.description: Scan SBOMs and images for known vulnerabilities

security_and_supply_chain.name: Trivy
security_and_supply_chain.description: Vulnerability/misconfiguration scanning for images, repos, and IaC

security_and_supply_chain.name: CIS Benchmarks
security_and_supply_chain.description: Security configuration benchmarks for platforms and components

finops_and_cost.name: FinOps Foundation Framework
finops_and_cost.description: FinOps practices for cloud cost governance and accountability

cicd.name: GitHub Actions Documentation
cicd.description: Workflows, environments, OIDC, secrets, and deployment protection rules

cicd.name: GitLab CI/CD Documentation
cicd.description: Pipelines, runners, environments, and security scanning

cloud_architecture_frameworks.name: AWS Well-Architected Framework
cloud_architecture_frameworks.description: Security, reliability, performance efficiency, cost optimization, sustainability

platform_engineering.name: Team Topologies
platform_engineering.description: Org design patterns (platform teams, stream-aligned teams, team interactions)

platform_engineering.name: CNCF Landscape
platform_engineering.description: Tooling map for cloud-native ecosystems (use for discovery, not authority)

platform_engineering.name: Backstage Documentation
platform_engineering.description: Spotify's open platform for building developer portals

aiops.name: PagerDuty AIOps (Optional)
aiops.description: Optional AIOps features for event intelligence and incident workflows

aiops.name: Alert summarization and incident assistance (Optional)
aiops.description: Optional automation layers for incident triage (requires human approval and audit)
